---
title: J. Upload to BigPicture
---

Push the validated bundle to BigPicture with **`bp-submitter`**. Note the
receiver-key precondition and remember to run with `--threads 1`.

::: {.callout-note}
## Coming soon
This page is part of the manual's skeleton. Its content is being written in
[issue #15](https://github.com/JeroenUMC/bp-sweden-web/issues/15).
:::
